critical.mandate: Tests must fail initially — this is the red phase of TDD
Each test maps to exactly one acceptance criterion

step.title: Load Acceptance Criteria
step.action: Read story file or PRD for acceptance criteria

step.title: Convert to Tests
step.action: Transform each AC into a failing acceptance test
One test per AC — clear 1:1 mapping

step.title: Implement Tests
step.action: Write the test code (red phase — tests must fail)

step.title: Validate Structure
step.action: Ensure tests are atomic, independent, and meaningful

step.title: Generate Output
step.action: Generate acceptance test document with AC-to-test mapping
